(1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Amendment Rules, 2010. (3) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, in Schedule |. after serial number 102 and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely - " Industry | Parameter Standard | | @ il = @ = | Cashew AT A- Emission Standards | | Seed Process [limiting i } Processing ! concentration in | [Industy — | | mgNm®| 250 | Cooking (roasted shell/ 150 Borma Oven Heater i 150 | (roasted shell/ deoiled | cake as fuel) Particulate matter l deoiled cake as fuel) | Staniaieiofit 17 et =yt - Cooking [ BomaOvenHeater | FiNote: All values of particulate matter shall be corrected at 4% Carbon Dioxide ! } » Each stack shall be at least 2 metres above the top most | point of the building, shed or plant in the industry. | | » The emissions from ‘Dog-house shall be channelised alongwith Roasting-drum emissions and shall pass through wet scrubber. « Bio-gasifier shall be installed if roasted shells are used as fuel _intheunit. -- 3 of 4 -- 4 IHE GAZETTEOF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Pagy 11—Src. 3(0)] [ 2 3 i -~ i [ I B- Effluent standards ) I [ Limiting concentration in r mg/l, except for pH | Infand surface | Public sewer | Land For .
